017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
024
025/**
026 * Same functionality as {@link ParserReader} except automatically decoded <c>%xx</c> escape sequences.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Escape sequences are assumed to be encoded UTF-8.  Extended Unicode (&gt;\u10000) is supported.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * If decoding is enabled, the following character replacements occur so that boundaries are not lost:
033 * <ul>
034 *    <li><js>'&amp;'</js> -&gt; <js>'\u0001'</js>
035 *    <li><js>'='</js> -&gt; <js>'\u0002'</js>
036 * </ul>
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/UonSupport">UON Basics</a>
040
041 * </ul>
042 */
043@SuppressWarnings({
044   "resource" // Reader resource managed by calling code
045})
046public class UonReader extends ParserReader {
047
048   private static int fromHexChar(int c) throws IOException {
049      if (c >= '0' && c <= '9')
050         return c - '0';
051      if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f')
052         return 10 + c - 'a';
053      if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F')
054         return 10 + c - 'A';
055      throw ioex("Invalid hex character ''{0}'' found in escape pattern.", c);
056   }
057
058   private final boolean decodeChars;
059
060   private final char[] buff;
061
062   // Writable properties.
063   private int iCurrent;
064   private int iEnd;
065
066   /**
067    * Constructor.
068    *
069    * @param pipe The parser input.
070    * @param decodeChars Whether the input is URL-encoded.
071    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
072    */
073   public UonReader(ParserPipe pipe, boolean decodeChars) throws IOException {
074      super(pipe);
075      this.decodeChars = decodeChars;
076      if (pipe.isString()) {
077         var in = pipe.getInputAsString();
078         this.buff = new char[in.length() < 1024 ? in.length() : 1024];
079      } else {
080         this.buff = new char[1024];
081      }
082   }
083
084   @Override /* Overridden from Reader */
085   @SuppressWarnings({
086      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for UON character reading with encoding handling
087   })
088   public int read(char[] cbuf, int off, int len) throws IOException {
089
090      if (! decodeChars)
091         return super.read(cbuf, off, len);
092
093      // Copy any remainder to the beginning of the buffer.
094      var remainder = iEnd - iCurrent;
095      if (remainder > 0)
096         System.arraycopy(buff, iCurrent, buff, 0, remainder);
097      iCurrent = 0;
098
099      var expected = buff.length - remainder;
100
101      var x = super.read(buff, remainder, expected);
102      if (x == -1 && remainder == 0)
103         return -1;
104
105      iEnd = remainder + (x == -1 ? 0 : x);
106
107      var i = 0;
108      while (i < len) {
109         if (iCurrent >= iEnd)
110            return i;
111         var c = buff[iCurrent++];
112         if (c == '+') {
113            cbuf[off + i++] = ' ';
114         } else if (c == '&') {
115            cbuf[off + i++] = '\u0001';
116         } else if (c == '=') {
117            cbuf[off + i++] = '\u0002';
118         } else if (c != '%') {
119            cbuf[off + i++] = c;
120         } else {
121            var iMark = iCurrent - 1;  // Keep track of current position.
122
123            // Stop if there aren't at least two more characters following '%' in the buffer,
124            // or there aren't at least two more positions open in cbuf to handle double-char chars.
125            if (iMark + 2 >= iEnd || i + 2 > len) {
126               iCurrent--;
127               return i;
128            }
129
130            var b0 = readEncodedByte();
131            int cx;
132
133            // 0xxxxxxx
134            if (b0 < 128) {
135               cx = b0;
136
137            } else if (b0 < 192) {
138               // 10xxxxxx
139               throw ioex("Invalid hex value for first escape pattern in UTF-8 sequence: {0}", b0);
140
141            } else if (b0 < 224) {
142               // 110xxxxx 10xxxxxx
143               // 11000000(192) - 11011111(223)
144               cx = readUTF8(b0 - 192, 1);
145               if (cx == -1) {
146                  iCurrent = iMark;
147                  return i;
148               }
149
150            } else if (b0 < 240) {
151               // 1110xxxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx
152               // 11100000(224) - 11101111(239)
153               cx = readUTF8(b0 - 224, 2);
154               if (cx == -1) {
155                  iCurrent = iMark;
156                  return i;
157               }
158
159            } else if (b0 < 248) {
160               // 11110xxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx
161               // 11110000(240) - 11110111(247)
162               cx = readUTF8(b0 - 240, 3);
163               if (cx == -1) {
164                  iCurrent = iMark;
165                  return i;
166               }
167
168            } else
169               throw ioex("Invalid hex value for first escape pattern in UTF-8 sequence: {0}", b0);
170
171            if (cx < 0x10000)
172               cbuf[off + i++] = (char)cx;
173            else {
174               cx -= 0x10000;
175               cbuf[off + i++] = (char)(0xd800 + (cx >> 10));
176               cbuf[off + i++] = (char)(0xdc00 + (cx & 0x3ff));
177            }
178         }
179      }
180      return i;
181   }
182
183   @Override /* Overridden from ParserReader */
184   public UonReader unread() throws IOException {
185      super.unread();
186      return this;
187   }
188
189   private int readEncodedByte() throws IOException {
190      if (iEnd <= iCurrent + 1)
191         throw ioex("Incomplete trailing escape pattern");
192      int h = buff[iCurrent++];
193      int l = buff[iCurrent++];
194      h = fromHexChar(h);
195      l = fromHexChar(l);
196      return (h << 4) + l;
197   }
198
199   private int readHex() throws IOException {
200      var c = buff[iCurrent++];
201      if (c != '%')
202         throw ioex("Did not find expected '%' character in UTF-8 sequence.");
203      return readEncodedByte();
204   }
205
206   private int readUTF8(int n, int numBytes) throws IOException {
207      if (iCurrent + numBytes * 3 > iEnd)
208         return -1;
209      for (var i = 0; i < numBytes; i++) {
210         n <<= 6;
211         n += readHex() - 128;
212      }
213      return n;
214   }
215}
